_comment: Standing white-banner geometry (post + crossbar + cloth) reproducing MC's banner-ITEM render (white_banner = minecraft:special/minecraft:banner; ItemDisplay context NONE → no item-model display transform, so this is the raw standing-banner special render). Canonical BannerModel dims (flag 20x40x1, post 2x42x2, crossbar 20x2x2) baked with the standing-render 2/3 scale; x/z centred on the anchor (model 8,8,8 = the windmill blades' pivot); post base at the block bottom; cloth offset to +z IN FRONT of the post (post behind the banner). Block-model space (16 = 1 block). Rendered by docs/util/blockmodel.js. CANDIDATE: scale / y-anchor / flag z-side to be verified against the docs windmill viewer.
